ms_camera_model.model package

Submodules

ms_camera_model.model.model module

Multispectral Camera Model - Simulation Model

  • Description: Simulated model of a multispectral camera. Takes in hyperspectral data and colour filter specs. Outputs multispectral data

  • Author: Tomas Vacek

class ms_camera_model.model.model.MultispectralCameraModel(hs_data: HyperspectralImageData, filter_sensor_units: list[FilterSensorUnit])[source]

Bases: object

Multispectral camera model

Parameters:

  • hs_data – HyperspectralImageData class instance

  • filter_sensor_units – list of FilterSensorUnit class instances

  • out_data – simulated multispectral image data as ImageData class instance

corrected_filter_sensor_units: list[FilterSensorUnit]
filter_sensor_units: list[FilterSensorUnit]
hs_data: HyperspectralImageData
out_data: ImageData
run_simulation() → ImageData[source]

Match filter_sensor_units specs with hs_data band_centers and calculate out_data

Returns:

Returns resulting simulated ImageData

Module contents

Multispectral Camera Model - Simulation Model

Simulated model of a multispectral camera. Takes in hyperspectral data and colour filter specs. Outputs multispectral data

class ms_camera_model.model.MultispectralCameraModel(hs_data: HyperspectralImageData, filter_sensor_units: list[FilterSensorUnit])[source]

Bases: object

Multispectral camera model

Parameters:

  • hs_data – HyperspectralImageData class instance

  • filter_sensor_units – list of FilterSensorUnit class instances

  • out_data – simulated multispectral image data as ImageData class instance

corrected_filter_sensor_units: list[FilterSensorUnit]
filter_sensor_units: list[FilterSensorUnit]
hs_data: HyperspectralImageData
out_data: ImageData
run_simulation() → ImageData[source]

Match filter_sensor_units specs with hs_data band_centers and calculate out_data

Returns resulting simulated ImageData
